goal: Add a side-effect-free in-memory audit artifact builder for cockpit patch audit receipt record audit authorities without durable audit writes, patch application, server/route mutation, permit consumption, or executable actions.
scope_out: Do not write audits, perform durable persistence, consume permits, apply patches, mutate server files, mutate route files, call providers, call DB, change package files, workflows, deployment files, or write runtime artifacts.
claims: Cockpit audit receipt record audit authority artifacts can produce an in-memory audit artifact.
Audited-at ref and audit evidence ref are required.
Audit writes, durable persistence, patch application, server mutation, route mutation, permit consumption, and executable actions remain false.
assumptions: Durable audit persistence requires a later task lock.
dod: Ready, missing audited-at ref, and blocked authority cases are tested.
Focused test, typecheck, task-lock verify, diff-check, and full builder tests pass.
stop_conditions: Durable audit write, durable persistence, permit consumption, patch application, server mutation, route mutation, executable action, external calls, DB, package, workflow, deployment, or runtime write changes become necessary.
prior_task_findings: BPK-199 authorized cockpit audit receipt record audit artifacts without recording them.
